nasb.text: Now the war against the Philistines was severe all the days of Saul; and when Saul saw any mighty man or any valiant man, he attached him to his staff.

esv.text: There was hard fighting against the Philistines all the days of Saul. And when Saul saw any strong man, or any valiant man, he attached him to himself.

cnv.text: 掃羅的一生常常與非利士人有猛烈的爭戰。每逢掃羅看見任何勇士或有能力的人，就都招募歸他。

ccb.text: 扫罗一生常和非利士人激烈交战。他遇见英勇的壮士，都会征募到自己的军队中。
